summary: Membres & Enregistrement ARS 1000 Module (Clauses 4.2.2, 4.2.3, 4.3) - Complete Testing. All 19 backend API tests PASSED. All 4 frontend pages verified working with proper UI elements, modals, and integrations.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend membres_ars.py is well-structured with 14 champs norme 4.2.3.2 (a-n) and 4 adhesion steps pre-defined
Adhesion workflow: etape_courante auto-calculated based on form completion (1-4), statut transitions (en_cours -> en_attente_validation -> valide/retrait)
Bulletin PDF generation uses reportlab with proper styling, includes all 14 champs and signature sections
Registre supports filters (statut, village, sexe, search) with pagination
Member update tracks history with date, user, and fields changed
Perimetre SM auto-calculates stats from validated members (total_membres_valides, total_hectares)
Dashboard returns 8 KPIs (total, valides, en_cours, en_attente_validation, retrait, hommes, femmes, total_hectares), par_village distribution, and latest perimetre
Excel export includes all 20 columns covering 4.2.3.2 fields plus metadata
Frontend components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
QuickActionsPanel correctly includes 'Membres' section with 4 items (Dashboard, Adhesion, Registre, Perimetre SM)
4-step wizard navigation works correctly (prev/next buttons, step indicators)
seed_data_creation: Created multiple adhesions during testing (TEST_Step1, TEST_Full, TEST_Retrait, TEST_Integration). Integration test created full workflow with adhesion creation, validation, and PDF generation.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Membres ARS 1000 module fully tested. 14 champs norme 4.2.3.2 defined (a-n). 4 adhesion steps: Sensibilisation, Collecte des informations, Bulletin d'adhesion, Validation. Current state: 7 total members (3 valides, 2 en_cours, 1 a_valider, 1 retrait), 2 hommes, 3 femmes, 15.5 hectares. Multiple perimetres created. Rate limiter may block after 30 attempts - restart backend to clear.

backend_endpoints.GET /api/membres/reference/etapes: PASSED - Returns 4 adhesion steps (Sensibilisation, Collecte des informations, Bulletin d'adhesion, Validation)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/membres/reference/champs: PASSED - Returns 14 champs norme 4.2.3.2 (a-n) with code, label, field, required
backend_endpoints.POST /api/membres/adhesion: PASSED - Creates adhesion with 4 steps data, auto-calculates etape_courante and statut
backend_endpoints.GET /api/membres/adhesions: PASSED - Returns adhesions with stats (total, en_cours, en_attente_validation, valides, retrait)
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/membres/adhesion/{id}/valider: PASSED - Validates adhesion, sets statut=valide, validation.validee=true
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/membres/adhesion/{id}/retrait: PASSED - Marks member withdrawal, sets statut=retrait
backend_endpoints.GET /api/membres/adhesion/{id}/bulletin/: PASSED - Generates bulletin PDF with all 14 champs and signatures
backend_endpoints.GET /api/membres/registre: PASSED - Returns all members with pagination (skip, limit, total)
backend_endpoints.PUT /api/membres/registre/{id}: PASSED - Updates member info with history tracking
backend_endpoints.POST /api/membres/perimetre: PASSED - Creates SM perimeter with auto-stats (total_membres_valides, total_hectares)
backend_endpoints.GET /api/membres/perimetre: PASSED - Returns perimeters list sorted by created_at desc
backend_endpoints.GET /api/membres/dashboard: PASSED - Returns KPIs (8 metrics), par_village distribution, latest perimetre
backend_endpoints.GET /api/membres/export/excel: PASSED - Downloads Excel with all 4.2.3.2 fields (20 columns)

frontend_pages./cooperative/membres: PASSED - Dashboard with 8 KPIs (Total, Actifs, En cours, A valider, Retraits, Hommes, Femmes, Hectares), village distribution bars, perimetre SM card, quick actions panel
frontend_pages./cooperative/membres/adhesion: PASSED - 4-step wizard (Sensibilisation, Informations 4.2.3.2, Bulletin d'adhesion, Recapitulatif & Validation) with stepper, prev/next navigation, submit button
frontend_pages./cooperative/membres/registre: PASSED - Members table with search input, filter dropdowns (statut, sexe), Export Excel button, validate and PDF buttons per row
frontend_pages./cooperative/membres/perimetre: PASSED - Perimeters list with create modal (description, producteurs, parcelles, exclusions, date, valide_par)

frontend_interactions.Dashboard navigation buttons: PASSED - Registre, Adhesion, Perimetre SM all navigate correctly
frontend_interactions.Adhesion wizard step navigation: PASSED - Next/Previous buttons work, step indicators update
frontend_interactions.Adhesion step 1 elements: PASSED - Sensibilisation checkbox, date input, accuse checkbox
frontend_interactions.Adhesion step 2 elements: PASSED - All 12 form fields for norme 4.2.3.2 (a-l)
frontend_interactions.Adhesion step 3 elements: PASSED - Signature checkboxes for producteur and 2 temoins
frontend_interactions.Registre filters: PASSED - Search, statut dropdown, sexe dropdown all work
frontend_interactions.Perimetre create modal: PASSED - Opens with form fields, submit button works
frontend_interactions.QuickActionsPanel: PASSED - Contains 'Membres' section with 4 items (Dashboard, Adhesion, Registre, Perimetre SM)
